title: Is there any way to track user activity excluding login?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am looking for a way to see the Date of the last activity of a user not including logging in. I see in the monday API that there is a last_activity  field for every User, but I believe this includes logging in …

posts.author: edhadgu (Elias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am looking for a way to see the Date of the last activity of a user not including logging in. I see in the monday API that there is a last_activity field for every User, but I believe this includes logging in as an activity. Is there a way, through an API, to see the last time a user edited/changed something?

Thank you

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @edhadgu,

I believe there is no easy way to check that.

You could check the activity logs of all your boards (as a not-so-great workaround) but this is all I can think of to get that information.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there friends! We’ve developed Master Activity Logs, which acts as a ‘Master Activity Log’ for user activities in multiple boards. One of our widgets shows the ‘last activity’ of each user. It offers advanced reporting based on activity log data as well. Hopefully that helps!
